title: rubus iscanus
intro: Rubus iscanus, also known as the Icicle Berry, is a species of wild raspberry native to the mountainous regions of the Balkan Peninsula. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus iscanus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus iscanus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
